prestazioni: Replace the stock **VG30ET** (3.0L SOHC V6 turbo) internals with forged **Manley Performance** 9.0:1 compression pistons, **Eagle Specialty Products** H-beam connecting rods, and a **Crower** billet crankshaft for 25 psi boost capability with a **Garrett GT3582R** turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 62mm inducer) on a **Tial MV-R 44mm** external wastegate

Upgrade the fuel system with **Walbro 450 LPH** in-tank pump, **ID1000x** injectors (1000cc/min), and a **Nistune Type 3** standalone ECU with **Z31-specific MAP sensor calibration** for precise AFR targeting (11.5:1 under full load)

Install a **GReddy Intercooler Kit (FMIC-001)** with 2.5" mandrel-bent aluminum piping, **HKS SSQV** blow-off valve, and **Mishimoto Z31-specific radiator** to maintain intake temps below 120°F at 1.5 bar boost
estetica: Fit a **Veilside Fortune 99** widebody kit with **Z31-specific flared rear quarters** (3.5" wider than stock) and **custom carbon fiber front splitter** (2.5" overhang) paired with **Work Meister S1 3P 17x9.5 +22** wheels (245/40/17 tires)
Replace the stock pop-up headlights with **Morimoto XB LED projectors** (3000K, 35W) in **Z31-specific H4 housings** and add **Depo Racing JDM-style taillights** with sequential LED turn signals

Install a **Seibon Carbon Fiber Z31 hood** (2x2 twill weave, 50% weight reduction) with **custom NACA ducts** for intercooler airflow, paired with a **Rocket Bunny Z31 rear diffuser** (3-piece, carbon-Kevlar hybrid)
